repos.name: Interactive Monte Carlo Simulations
repos.description: Educational interactive simulations for high school students exploring probability, statistics, and random processes. Includes visualizations of the Law of Large Numbers, birthday paradox, and random walks using $$ \text{LLN} $$ principles.

repos.name: 3D Fluid Dynamics Solver
repos.description: A WebGL-based fluid simulation engine for visualizing turbulent flows and dynamic systems. Originally developed for this website's background, now available as a standalone educational tool.

repos.name: IISER Tirupati Coding Club Resources
repos.description: Collection of tutorials, problem sets, and solutions from the IISER coding club. Covers Python, competitive programming, and practical coding skills for scientists.

repos.name: Interstellar Medium Data Analyzer
repos.description: Tools for statistical analysis of 3D reconstructed ISM distributions. Implements Minkowski functionals and morphological analysis for characterizing cosmic structure.
